lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: Nilsal. Is there something I can do for you, my child?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: I would suggest you speak to my counterpart instead. Those of us dedicated to Ranul do not specialise in that sort of thing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the giant tree stump all about?

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: This stump is all that remains of the Great Auburn Redwood. It was, and in many ways still is, one of the key holy sites of Varlamore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened to it?

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: The tree was destroyed during the War of Betrayal many years ago. It was here in the Auburn Valley that the fighting was at its most fierce.

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: Both sides resorted to tactics that most would consider to be beyond horrifying. The tree was sadly a casualty of such tactics.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which side was responsible?

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: That has never been clear. Ranul teaches us to find and preserve the truth, but in war, the truth is sadly left behind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So the battles that took place here... Is that why all these animal spirits are here now?

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: Yes. They are the spirits of the animals that died here during the War of Betrayal. They did not pass on to Mictl, for they have unfinished business in these lands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What business?

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: That is beyond our understanding. We believe they are here to guide the ents that live in the valley so that they may one day regrow the Great Auburn Redwood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The ents can do that?

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: Much of the valley was destroyed during the war. Most of what you see around you was regrown by the ents.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's incredible!

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: Indeed it is, my child. That is why it is our duty to ensure the ents are protected. The events of the war cannot be repeated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Dominicus, Teoki of Ranul
lines.text: Then go in peace, my child.
